title: Take Next Patient from Sorted Queue
description: The system shall provide the patient at the top of the queue when a physician requests the next patient.
rationale: To ensure that patients are attended to based on their urgency, thereby improving treatment outcomes and reducing wait times for urgent cases.
business_value: Improves patient satisfaction by addressing urgent needs promptly and efficiently, leading to better health outcomes and reduced healthcare costs.

source.description: As a physician I need to take the next patient from the top of the sorted queue so that I can attend to the most urgent case first.

acceptance_criteria: The system provides the patient at the top of the queue when a physician requests the next patient.
preconditions: The patient queue is sorted by urgency.
A physician has access to the queue system.
postconditions: The patient at the top of the queue is removed from the queue.
The physician receives the details of the next patient for attendance.
security_requirements: Authentication and authorization checks are performed to ensure that only authorized personnel can access the queue system.

usability.error_handling: Clear error messages and retry options
usability.interface_behavior: Intuitive and user-friendly interface for physician interaction

edge_cases: The queue is empty when a physician requests the next patient.
A new patient is added to the queue while a physician is retrieving the next patient.

interfaces.name: Patient Queue API
interfaces.description: The system interacts with the Patient Queue API to retrieve the top patient from the queue.

interfaces.name: Authentication and Authorization Service
interfaces.description: The system uses the Authentication and Authorization Service to ensure that only authorized physicians can access the queue system.

test_cases.description: Retrieve next patient from an empty queue.
test_cases.expected_result: The system should return a message indicating that the queue is empty and no patient was retrieved.

test_cases.description: Retrieve next patient when a new patient is added to the queue while retrieving.
test_cases.expected_result: The system should retrieve the patient at the top of the updated queue.
